title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Warehouse overload message**: Dashboards now show a message explaining when rendering is delayed due to the warehouse being overloaded.
* **Tabular attachments in email subscriptions**: Dashboard email subscriptions now include tabular attachments.
* **Fullscreen scroll position**: Exiting fullscreen mode on a published dashboard now returns you to your previous scroll position instead of jumping to the top of the page.
* **Widget query batch fix**: Fixed a bug where a widget query failing for one widget caused all other widgets in the same query batch to fail.
